title: LoginRedeemRequest
description:
`POST /v1/login` body — redeem a LOGIN grant: prove the device key the grant is bound to and
receive one workspace credential per confirmed seat. The grant is the bearer credential; the
device public key is a binding check (nothing signs).

device_public_key.description: The device's raw 32-byte public key, base64url-unpadded — must equal the grant's bound key.

grant.description: The opaque grant from the login device flow (the bearer credential for this one exchange).
